title: Braintree Customer
description: Represents a customer record stored in the Braintree Vault. Customer records serve as containers for vaulted payment methods, billing addresses, and associated transaction history. They enable returning customer checkout flows and are required for managing subscriptions and recurring billing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the customer. Auto-generated by Braintree if not specified at creation.

email.description: Customer's email address. Must use ASCII characters only.

company.description: Name of the company or organization associated with this customer.

website.description: Customer's website URL. Must be a well-formed URL.

payment_methods.description: Collection of vaulted payment methods associated with this customer.

addresses.description: Collection of stored billing and shipping addresses associated with this customer.

custom_fields.description: Custom key-value pairs associated with this customer. Keys must be pre-configured as custom fields in the Braintree Control Panel.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the customer record was created, in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the customer record was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

PaymentMethod.description: A payment method stored in the Braintree Vault for a customer. This is a polymorphic object representing credit cards, PayPal accounts, Venmo accounts, or other supported payment types.

token.description: Unique token identifying this vaulted payment method. Used to reference the payment method in transactions and subscriptions.

customer_id.description: Identifier of the customer who owns this payment method.

default.description: Indicates whether this is the customer's default payment method used when no specific token is specified.

image_url.description: URL of an image representing the payment method type, such as a card brand logo.

subscriptions.description: Active subscriptions using this payment method.

items.description: Brief summary of a subscription using this payment method.

plan_id.description: Billing plan identifier for this subscription.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this payment method was vaulted, in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this payment method was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

Address.description: A billing or shipping address stored in the Braintree Vault for a customer.

id.description: Unique identifier for this stored address.

customer_id.description: Identifier of the customer this address belongs to.

first_name.description: First name of the address holder.

last_name.description: Last name of the address holder.

company.description: Company or organization name at this address.

extended_address.description: Secondary address line such as apartment or suite number.

locality.description: City or locality of the address.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this address was created, in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when this address was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.
